ptzCameras.notes: 4K UHD PTZ, 1-inch CMOS. HFOV 73.0°–5.7°, focal 8.3–124.5mm from Canon published spec sheet. (Addendum A Section A.3)
CR-N500 shares the same 1-inch sensor and 15x lens as the CR-N700. HFOV 73.0°–5.7°, focal 8.3–124.5mm. (Addendum A Section A.3)
1/2.3-inch CMOS, 20x. Focal range 3.67-73.4mm from Canon shop page. CR-N300 and CR-N100 share identical sensor and lens. (Addendum A Section A.3)
Same 1/2.3-inch sensor and lens spec as CR-N300. (Addendum A Section A.3)
1-inch Exmor R CMOS, 12x. HFOV 64.6° manufacturer-published (Sony pro spec sheet). Focal range 9.3-111.6mm. (Addendum A Section A.4)

1-inch Exmor R CMOS, 12x Zeiss Vario-Sonnar T*. Clear Image Zoom extends to 24x (HD). HFOV from Sony specs / B&H. Focal lengths derived from HFOV and sensor width. 3G-SDI + HDMI output. Discontinued. (Duplicate entry removed v1.2.1 — second entry claimed shared optics with BRC-X1000 at 9.3–111.6mm with hFOVTele 6.8°; kept this entry's Sony/B&H-sourced values.)

1-inch Exmor RS CMOS, 20x. Focal range 8.8–176.0mm back-calculated from 24–480mm (35mm equiv) using sensorWidthMM/36.0 scale factor. hFOVWide 75.0° published by Sony (official help guide, 'Approx. 75°'). hFOVTele 4.3° calculated from maxFocalLengthMM (calc). (W) variant is white — identical specs. Lens module (8.8–176mm, 1-inch sensor) appears shared with Panasonic AW-HE145/UE160/UE150 series — same hFOVWide within 0.1°. Current.
1/2.5-inch CMOS, 20x. BRC-X400 and SRG-X400 share identical sensor and lens specs. Focal range 4.4-88mm. (Addendum A Section A.4)
Same sensor and lens as BRC-X400. (Addendum A Section A.4)
1/2.5-inch CMOS, 12x. HFOV 70.0° verified against Sony SRG-X120 spec sheet. Focal range approx 4.4-52.8mm. (Addendum A Section A.4)
1-inch, 20x. AW-UE150 and UE150A are equivalent for FOV purposes. Supports digital crop mode (UHD crop changes active sensor area — use sensorOverride if needed). (Addendum A Section A.5)
1/2.5-inch CMOS, 24x. HFOV 74.1°–3.3°, focal 4.12–98.9mm from Panasonic spec sheet. (Addendum A Section A.5)
1/2.5-inch CMOS, 24x. HFOV 74.1°–3.3°, focal 4.12–98.9mm from Panasonic spec sheet. (Addendum A Section A.5)
Free tier PTZ. 1/2.5-inch CMOS, 24x. HFOV 74.1°–3.3°, focal 4.12–98.9mm from Panasonic spec sheet. Sensor corrected from 1/2.8-inch. (Addendum A Section A.5)
1/2.8-inch Exmor CMOS, 30x. Shares 4.3–129mm OEM lens module with JVC KY-PZ100 and BirdDog P200. hFOVTele 2.3° calculated (†). Discontinued.
Same sensor and 30x lens module as SRG-300H. hFOVTele 2.3° calculated (†). Discontinued.
3-CMOS (3× 1/2-inch Exmor), 14x. Both HFOV values calculated (†) using 6.4mm sensor width per standard 1/2-inch dimension. Discontinued.
1-inch MOS, 20x. Flagship with SMPTE ST 2110 support. Shares 8.8–176mm lens module with AW-UE150, AW-HE145. HFOV published by Panasonic. Current.
January 2025 revision of AW-UE150. Adds NDI High Bandwidth and improved OIS. Identical optics to AW-UE150. HFOV published by Panasonic. Current.
1/2.5-inch MOS, 24x. Shares 4.12–98.9mm lens module with AW-UE80/UE50/UE40. HFOV inferred from identical lens/sensor (‡); published at 3.3° for UE50/UE40. Current.
1/2.5-inch MOS, 20x. Same sensor as UE100/UE80/UE50/UE40 but shorter 20x zoom (4.12–82.4mm). HFOV published by Panasonic. Current.
1/2.8-inch MOS, 12x. Entry-level UE series. Shares optics with AW-HE20. HFOV published by Panasonic. Current.

1/2.5-inch MOS, fixed 2.21mm wide-angle lens. 111° HFOV published by Panasonic (LDC off). Motorized PTZ (+-110° pan, +-25° tilt). No optical zoom; digital zoom up to 4x with digital pan/tilt overlay. ePTZ camera. Current.
1-inch MOS, 20x. Shares 8.8–176mm lens module with AW-UE160, AW-UE150. HFOV published by Panasonic. Current.
3-CMOS (3× 1/2.86-inch 3MOS), 20x. Both HFOV values calculated (†) using 5.0mm sensor width. Discontinued.
1/2.3-inch MOS, 20x. Focal range ~4.8–96.7mm. hFOVTele 3.7° calculated (†). Discontinued.
1/2.3-inch MOS, 30x. Both HFOV values calculated (†). Discontinued.
1/2.3-inch MOS, 22x optical zoom. HFOV 61.6° (wide) / 2.9° (tele) from published specs. Focal range 4.3–94.6mm. Source: avalive.com quoting Panasonic official specs.
1/2.8-inch MOS, 12x. Shares optics with AW-UE20. HFOV published by Panasonic. Current.

1/2.3-inch CMOS, 20x. DIGIC DV7. HFOV varies by frame rate: 63.3° wide at 50/59.94 Hz, 65.6° at 29.97/25/23.98 Hz. Shares optics with CR-N350; N400 adds 12G-SDI, genlock, timecode, dual XLR. Announced November 2025.
Same 1/2.3-inch sensor and 20x lens as CR-N400. DIGIC DV7. HFOV 63.3° at 50/59.94 Hz, 65.6° at other frame rates. Announced November 2025.
IP65 outdoor-rated variant. Same 1/2.3-inch optics as CR-N300. HFOV published by Canon (4K mode). Current.
1/2.8-inch CMOS, 30x. Shares 4.3–129mm OEM lens module with Sony SRG-300H and BirdDog P200. HFOV published by JVC. Legacy/current.
1/2.8-inch CMOS, 20x. HFOV published by JVC. Optically identical to KY-PZ200N (NDI variant). Current.
Same optics as KY-PZ200; adds NDI|HX. HFOV published by JVC. Current.
1/2.5-inch CMOS, 12x. HFOV published by JVC. NDI|HX native. Current.

1/2.8-inch CMOS (4K), 12x. Broadest HFOV of any broadcast PTZ at 80.0° (published). Effective sensor width back-calculated as 5.71mm from published 80° at f=3.4mm. hFOVTele 7.8° calculated (†). Current.
1/1.8-inch CMOS, 20x optical (40x VSM Variable Scan Mapping in HD). Both HFOV values calculated (†) using 7.18mm sensor width. NDI|HX native. Current.
1/2.8-inch CMOS, 20x. Shares optics with VC-A51P and VC-A53. hFOVTele 2.7° calculated (†). Discontinued.
1/2.8-inch CMOS, 20x. Different lens from VC-A50P (4.7–94mm vs 5.33–110mm). hFOVTele 3.1° calculated (†). Discontinued.
Same optics as VC-A50P. hFOVTele 2.7° calculated (†). Discontinued.
Same optics as VC-A50P/VC-A51P. hFOVTele 2.7° calculated (†). Current.
1/2.5-inch CMOS, 30x. hFOVTele 2.4° calculated (†). Optically identical to VC-A61PN (PN adds NDI). Discontinued.
Same optics as VC-A61P; adds NDI. hFOVTele 2.4° calculated (†). Discontinued.
1/1.8-inch CMOS, 30x. Shares 6.5–202mm OEM lens module with Marshall CV730. HFOV wide and tele published by Lumens. Current.
Same optics as VC-A71P; adds NDI. HFOV published. Current.
Same optics as VC-A71P; variant with additional connectivity. HFOV published. Current.

PTZ lens: 1/2.8-inch 2.13MP CMOS, 20x (actual 19.18x). Focal range 4.9–94mm from official Lumens VC-TR1 datasheet (mylumens.com, September 2021 version). hFOVWide 58.7° published. hFOVTele 3.4° (calc), confirmed by two independent methods using sensor dimensions and back-calculation from stated wide FOV.
1/2.8-inch CMOS, 12x. hFOVTele 6.3° calculated (†). Current.
1/2.3-inch CMOS (9MP), 12x. hFOVTele 7.5° calculated (†). Sensor size conflicts on Marshall's own page (1/2.3" header vs 1/2.8" body); 1/2.3" used as most likely given 9MP. Discontinued.
1/2.8-inch CMOS, 20x. Both HFOV values calculated (†) from 5.3–110mm focal range. BK4=black, WH4=white. Current.
Same optics as CV620-BK4/WH4. IP variant. Both HFOV values calculated (†). Current.
1/2.5-inch CMOS, 25x. Official 2025 cut sheet: 68° HFOV, 4.8–120.5mm. Note: some retailers list 30x/135mm specs that belong to the CV630-NDI. Current.
1/2.5-inch CMOS, 30x. Focal range 4.6–135mm, hFOVWide 70° from Marshall product page. hFOVTele 2.44° (calc) from sensor width 5.76mm and maxFocalLengthMM 135mm.
1/2.5-inch CMOS, 25x. Focal range 4.6–120.5mm, hFOVWide 68° from marshall-usa.com. hFOVTele 2.73° (calc) from sensor width 5.76mm and maxFocalLengthMM 120.5mm.
1/1.8-inch CMOS, 30x. Shares 6.5–202mm OEM lens module with Lumens VC-A71P. hFOV wide/tele confirmed by Greg Foster, Applications Engineer, Marshall Electronics. Discontinued.
1/1.8-inch CMOS, 30x. hFOV wide/tele confirmed by Greg Foster, Applications Engineer, Marshall Electronics. Current.
1/1.8-inch Sony CMOS, 25x. Focal range 7.1–171.95mm, hFOVWide 60° from marshall-usa.com. hFOVTele 2.39° (calc) from sensor width 7.18mm and maxFocalLengthMM 171.95mm.

1/2.8-inch CMOS, 5x optical zoom. Focal range 3–15mm. hFOVWide 85°, hFOVTele 16° both published directly by Marshall (3dbroadcastsales.com: '85° to 16°'). Source: marshall-usa.com and 3dbroadcastsales.com.
1/2.86-inch CMOS, 10x. HFOV published by BirdDog. P-series superseded by X-series but widely deployed. Discontinued.
Same optics as P100. HFOV published by BirdDog. Discontinued.
1/2.86-inch CMOS, 20x. Different lens module from P100/P110. HFOV published by BirdDog. Discontinued.
1/2.8-inch CMOS, 30x. Shares 4.3–129mm OEM lens module with Sony SRG-300H and JVC KY-PZ100. HFOV published by BirdDog. Discontinued.
1/2.5-inch CMOS, 20x optical (40x SRZ Super Resolution Zoom). HFOV inferred from identical sensor/lens as P400 (‡). Discontinued.
1/2.5-inch CMOS, 20x optical (40x SRZ). Shares 4.4–88.4mm lens with Sony BRC-X400/SRG-X400. HFOV published by BirdDog. Discontinued.
1-inch Exmor R CMOS, 12x Zeiss Vario-Sonnar T* (24x SRZ). Shares same sensor and lens as Sony BRC-X1000/BRC-H800. HFOV published by BirdDog. Discontinued.
1/2.8-inch CMOS, 20x. HFOV published by Datavideo. Current.

1/2.8-inch CMOS, 30x. Focal range 4.3–129mm, hFOVWide 63.7°, hFOVTele 2.3° published by Datavideo (ManualsLib official manual). maxFocalLengthMM corrected from 94.6 to 129.0 in v1.4.4 — prior value was a data entry error.
1/2.8-inch CMOS, 30x. HDBaseT version. Focal range 4.3–129mm per datavideo.com/us/product/PTC-150T. hFOVWide 63.7°, hFOVTele 2.3° as published by Datavideo.
1/2.5-inch CMOS, 12x. Focal range 4.4–52.8mm, hFOVWide 71° from singaporeproaudio.com and ManualsLib PTC-280NDI manual. hFOVTele 6.24° (calc) from sensor width 5.76mm and maxFocalLengthMM 52.8mm.

1/2.8-inch CMOS, 12x. Focal range 4.4–52.8mm from datavideo.com/us/product/PTC-285. hFOVWide 80° as published. hFOVTele 6.1° (calc) from sensor width 5.63mm and maxFocalLengthMM 52.8mm. Note: stated 80° wide includes barrel distortion and is inconsistent with the rectilinear formula — tele value is more accurate.
1/2.8-inch CMOS, 12x. HDBaseT version. Identical optics to PTC-285. Focal range 4.4–52.8mm from datavideo.com/us/product/PTC-285T. hFOVTele 6.1° (calc).
1/1.8-inch CMOS, 20x. Focal range 6.7–125mm, hFOVWide 60° from ManualsLib PTC-300 official manual. hFOVTele 3.29° (calc) from sensor width 7.18mm and maxFocalLengthMM 125mm.
1/1.8-inch CMOS, 20x. Auto-tracking version. Identical optics to PTC-300. Focal range 6.7–125mm, hFOVWide 60°. hFOVTele 3.29° (calc).
1/1.8-inch CMOS, 20x. HDBaseT auto-tracking version. Identical optics to PTC-300/305. Focal range 6.7–125mm, hFOVWide 60°. hFOVTele 3.29° (calc).
1/2.5-inch Sony CMOS 8.51MP, 12x. Focal range 4.4–52.8mm, hFOVWide 72.5°, hFOVTele 6.9° all published in PTZOptics official data sheet v3.0 (2025-02-03).
1/1.8-inch CMOS, 20x. PT20X-4K-G3. Wide HFOV published; hFOVTele 3.3° calculated (†). Shares optics with Link 4K 20X. NDI|HX3. Current.
1/1.8-inch CMOS, 30x. PT30X-4K-G3. HFOV published by PTZOptics. Shares optics with Link 4K 30X. NDI|HX3. Current.

1/2.5-inch Sony CMOS 8.51MP, 12x. Dante AV-H version. Identical optics to Move 4K 12X. Focal range 4.4–52.8mm, hFOVWide 72.5°, hFOVTele 6.9° all published in PTZOptics official data sheet v3.0 (2024-10-03).
Identical optics to Move 4K 20X. PT20X-LINK-4K. Adds Dante AV-H. hFOVTele 3.3° calculated (†). Current.
Identical optics to Move 4K 30X. PT30X-LINK-4K. Adds Dante AV-H. Current.
1/2.8-inch CMOS, 12x. PT12X-SE-G3. HFOV published. 1080p with free NDI upgrade. Current.
1/2.8-inch CMOS, 20x. PT20X-SE-G3. HFOV published by PTZOptics. 1080p with free NDI upgrade. Current.
1/2.8-inch CMOS, 30x. PT30X-SE-G3. HFOV published. 1080p with free NDI upgrade. Current.
1/2.7-inch CMOS, 12x. PT12X-SDI-G2. Wide HFOV published; hFOVTele 7.3° calculated (†). Discontinued.
1/2.7-inch CMOS, 20x. PT20X-SDI-G2. Wide HFOV published; hFOVTele 3.5° calculated (†). Discontinued.
1/2.7-inch CMOS, 30x. PT30X-SDI-G2. HFOV published by PTZOptics. Discontinued.

4K 60fps, 1/1.8-inch CMOS, 20x. HFOV 60.0°/3.5° published by Fomako (labeled H and V on product page). Focal range 6.25–125mm. fomako.net/product/FoMaKo-4K-PTZ-Camera-60FPS-20X-Optical-Zoom.html. Current.
Same optical module as K820; adds NDI|HX3. 4K 60fps, 1/1.8-inch CMOS, 20x. HFOV 60.0°/3.5° published by Fomako. fomako.net/product/FoMaKo-4K-NDI-Camera-60FPS-20X-Optical-Zoom.html. Current.

4K, 1/2.8-inch Sony UHD CMOS 8.42MP, 30x. HFOV and DFOV explicitly separated on product page (H: 58.1°/2.14°, D: 65.4°/2.48°); HFOV used. Focal range 5.2–148.4mm; published zoom 30x (focal ratio ≈28.5x). Industry-standard 5.14mm sensor width does not back-calculate to match published HFOV; manufacturer active area is wider — HFOV authoritative. fomako.net/product/fomako-k30ns-4k-30x-hdmi-3gsdi-ndi-ptz-camera.html. Current.
1080p 60fps, 1/2.8-inch CMOS 2.07MP, 20x. HFOV 60.7°/3.36° published by Fomako (labeled H). Focal range 4.42–88.5mm. fomako.net/product/fomako-k20-camera-1080p-60fps-20x-optical-zoom.html. Current.
1080p 60fps, 1/2.8-inch CMOS, 30x. HFOV 60.7°/2.28° published by Fomako. Focal range 4.42–132.6mm. fomako.net/product/fomako-k30-camera-1080p-60fps-30x-optical-zoom.html. Current.
Same optical module as K20; adds NDI|HX3. 1080p, 1/2.8-inch CMOS, 20x. HFOV 60.7°/3.36° published by Fomako. fomako.net/product/fomako-kn20-ndi-camera-1080p-60fps-20x-optical-zoom.html. Current.
Same optical module as K30; adds NDI|HX3. 1080p, 1/2.8-inch CMOS, 30x. HFOV 60.7°/2.28° published by Fomako. fomako.net/product/fomako-kn30-ndi-camera-1080p-60fps-30x-optical-zoom.html. Current.

1/2.8-inch CMOS (IMX415), 20x. NDI 6 & HX3 Pro series. Different lens module from KN20 (5.1–94.5mm vs 4.42–88.5mm). HFOV 60.0°/3.5° published by Fomako. fomako.net/product/FOMAKO-KN20A-NDI-PTZ.html. Current.

1/2.8-inch CMOS, 30x. NDI 6 & HX3 Pro series. Same optical module as K30NS. HFOV 58.1°/2.14° published by Fomako (H values from H/D/V table). fomako.net/product/FOMAKO-KN30A-NDI-PTZ-Camera.html. Current.
1/2.8-inch HD CMOS, 12x. HDMI+USB output. HFOV 72.5°/7.4° published by Fomako (View Angle). fomako.net/product/FOMAKO-HDMI-USB-FMK12UH.html. Current.

1/2.8-inch HD CMOS, 20x. HDMI+USB output. Distinct lens module from K20 (4.7–94mm vs 4.42–88.5mm). HFOV 58.7°/3.2° published by Fomako (View Angle). fomako.net/product/FOMAKO-HDMI-USB-FMK20UH.html. Current.
4K 60fps, 1/2.8-inch CMOS, 20x. NDI|HX3. Same optical module as KN20A. HFOV 60.0°/3.5° published by Fomako. fomako.net/product/fomako-k600n-ndi-camera-4k-60fps-20x-optical-zoom.html. Current.

1/2.8-inch Sony Progressive scan CMOS, 10x. HFOV 68.8°/8.8° labeled 'horizontal angle of view' by Bolin. Focal range 4.34–35.17mm. bolintechnology.com/product/b2-210-b2-220-full-hd-proav-ptz-camera. Current.

1/2.8-inch Sony Progressive scan CMOS, 20x. HFOV 55.8°/3.2° labeled 'horizontal angle of view' by Bolin. Focal range 5.2–104mm. bolintechnology.com/product/b2-210-b2-220-full-hd-proav-ptz-camera. Current.

4K 60fps, 1/2.8-inch Sony CMOS 8.29MP, 20x. Ultra-wide conferencing optics. HFOV 78.59°/4.92° labeled 'horizontal angle of view' by Bolin. Focal range 3.55–71mm. bolintechnology.com/product/b6-420-4k60-conferencing-ptz-camera. Current.

1-inch back-illuminated Exmor R CMOS, 12x optical (Bolin markets as 18x(4K)/24x(FHD) including electronic zoom). Same lens module as Sony BRC-X1000 and BirdDog P4K. HFOV 64.6°/6.1° published by Bolin. Focal range 9.3–111.6mm. bolintechnology.com/product/r9-418f-1-inch-4k-ptz-camera. Current.

Same optical module as R9-418F; adds NDI High Bandwidth. 1-inch Exmor R CMOS, 12x optical. HFOV 64.6°/6.1° published by Bolin. bolintechnology.com/product/r9-418n-1-inch-4k-high-bandwidth-ndi-ptz-camera. Current.

1/1.8-inch Sony STARVIS 2 CMOS, 30x. HFOV 58.1°/2.3° published by Bolin. Focal range 6.5–162.5mm (published zoom 30x; focal ratio ≈25x by length). bolintechnology.com/product/r9-230h-fhd-low-light-performance-ptz. Current.

All-weather indoor/outdoor PTZ. 1/1.8-inch Sony STARVIS 2 CMOS, 25x. HFOV 59.2°/2.5° published by Bolin. Focal range 7.1–171.95mm. Same lens module as Minrray UV430E2. bolintechnology.com/product/range-ptz-camera-all-weather-indoor-outdoor-professional-ptz. Current.
Same optical module as B2-210; adds Dante AV-H. 1/2.8-inch Sony CMOS, 10x. HFOV 68.8°/8.8° published by Bolin. bolintechnology.com/product/d2-210h-d2-220h-dante-av-h-ptz-camera. Current.
Same optical module as B2-220; adds Dante AV-H. 1/2.8-inch Sony CMOS, 20x. HFOV 55.8°/3.2° published by Bolin. bolintechnology.com/product/d2-210h-d2-220h-dante-av-h-ptz-camera. Current.
Same optical module as B2-210; adds NDI|HX3. 1/2.8-inch Sony CMOS, 10x. HFOV 68.8°/8.8° published by Bolin. bolintechnology.com/product/n2-210x-n2-220x-fhd-ndi-hx3-ptz-camera. Current.
Same optical module as B2-220; adds NDI|HX3. 1/2.8-inch Sony CMOS, 20x. HFOV 55.8°/3.2° published by Bolin. bolintechnology.com/product/n2-210x-n2-220x-fhd-ndi-hx3-ptz-camera. Current.
4K 60fps, 1/2.8-inch 4K Exmor CMOS 8MP, 12x. AVer publishes HFOV/VFOV/DFOV separately: HFOV 72.1°/6.3°, DFOV 79.2°/7.5°. Focal range 3.9–46.8mm. averusa.com/products/ptz-camera/ptz310uv2. Current.
4K 60fps, 1/2.8-inch 4K Exmor CMOS 8MP, 30x. AVer publishes HFOV/VFOV/DFOV separately: HFOV 62.3°/2.5°, DFOV 69.2°/2.8°. Focal range 4.5–135mm. averusa.com/products/ptz-camera/ptz330uv2. Current.

Same optical module as PTZ330UV2; adds NDI|HX3 native. 1/2.8-inch 4K Exmor CMOS 8MP, 30x. HFOV 62.3°/2.5° from AVer product page. Focal range 4.5–135mm. presentation.aver.com/model/ptz330unv2. Current.

4K, 1/2.5-inch Sony CMOS 8.51MP, 12x. Part of UV430A family. FOV explicitly labeled H (horizontal) and V on manufacturer page — HFOV 80.4°/7.59° used. Focal range 3.85–43.06mm. minrraycam.com/uv430a-4k-ultra-hd-ndi-ptz-camera.html. Current.

4K, 1/2.5-inch Sony CMOS 8.51MP, 25x. Part of UV430A family. HFOV 59.2°/2.5° explicitly labeled H on manufacturer page. Focal range 7.1–171.95mm. Same lens module as Bolin RANGE (7.1–171.95mm, 59.2°/2.5°). minrraycam.com/uv430a-4k-ultra-hd-ndi-ptz-camera.html. Current.

4K, 1/2.5-inch Sony CMOS 8.51MP, 31x. Part of UV430A family. HFOV 59.0°/1.98° explicitly labeled H on manufacturer page. Focal range 6.91–214.64mm. minrraycam.com/uv430a-4k-ultra-hd-ndi-ptz-camera.html. Current.

1080p, 1/2.8-inch CMOS 2.07MP, 12x. Part of UV510A family. HFOV 70.4°/6.6° labeled 'Viewing Angle (Horizontal)' on manufacturer page. UV510F0 has identical optical specs (different connectivity). Focal range 3.9–46.8mm. minrraycam.com/uv510a-series-full-hd-ptz-camera.html. Current.

1080p, 1/2.8-inch CMOS 2.07MP, 20x. Part of UV510A family. HFOV 54.7°/3.3° labeled 'Viewing Angle (Horizontal)' on manufacturer page. UV510F1 has identical optical specs (different connectivity). Focal range 5.5–110mm. minrraycam.com/uv510a-series-full-hd-ptz-camera.html. Current.

1080p, 1/2.8-inch CMOS 2.07MP, 12x. Part of UV950A family; identical optical module to UV510E0. HFOV 70.4°/6.6° labeled 'Viewing Angle (Horizontal)' on manufacturer page. UV950F0 has identical optical specs. Focal range 3.9–46.8mm. minrraycam.com/uv950a-series-full-hd-ptz-camera.html. Current.

1080p, 1/2.8-inch CMOS 2.07MP, 20x. Part of UV950A family; identical optical module to UV510E2. HFOV 54.7°/3.3° labeled 'Viewing Angle (Horizontal)' on manufacturer page. UV950F1 has identical optical specs. Focal range 5.5–110mm. minrraycam.com/uv950a-series-full-hd-ptz-camera.html. Current.
